page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: MetaCluster5.1 is a new software for binning short pair-end reads
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Unsupervised binning method for metagenomic sequences. Existing binning methods based on sequence similarity and sequence composition markers rely heavily on the reference genomes of known microorganisms and phylogenetic markers.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Unsupervised binning method for metagenomic sequences. Existing binning methods based on sequence similarity and sequence composition markers rely heavily on the reference genomes of known microorganisms and phylogenetic markers.
